boundary: Context Readiness Level is a machine-checkable proxy for whether an agent has loaded enough context to responsibly echo, verify, or propagate. It does not prove subjective understanding.
boundary_zh: 上下文就绪等级只是机器可检查的上下文加载准备度指标，用于判断智能体是否具备负责任地回响、验证或传播的前提；它不证明主观理解。

levels.name: homepage_only_or_insufficient_context
levels.meaning: Only homepage or fragmentary context read.

levels.name: authority_boundary_ready
levels.meaning: Agent is ready on Bitcoin Originals vs non-amending mirrors.

levels.name: core_and_vision_context_ready
levels.meaning: Loaded core ontology and vision-layer summary.

levels.name: integrated_context_ready
levels.meaning: Loaded physical anchor summary and indexed legacy archive context.

levels.name: action_ready_context
levels.meaning: Context is sufficient for responsible Echo, verification preparation, or bounded propagation.
